# Mault performance redesign demo

Independent redesign prototype by Tech Adventures. This is not Mault's production website and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Mault.

The demo presents Mault's public product story as a fast, accessible Astro experience focused on deterministic governance, observability, and audit-ready evidence for AI-assisted software development.

- Full machine-readable route summary: /llms-full.txt
- XML sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Security contact: /.well-known/security.txt
- Source: https://github.com/ii-am-modiify/mault-ai-performance-redesign
